final:
// // This module divides the input clock frequency by two and inverts the output signal on each rising edge of the input clock, except when the reset signal is active (high).
module top_module(
	input wire in,
	input wire rst,
	
	output reg out
);always @ (posedge in or negedge rst) begin
	if(rst == 0) begin
		
		out <= 0;
	
	end
	else begin
	
		out <= ~out;
		
	end
end


endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module divides the input clock frequency by two and inverts the output signal on each rising edge of the input clock, except when the reset signal is active (high).
